lms_data.question: Spots and stripes are patterns that we can see on animals and things around us. [{}] are round shapes, like little circles. [{}] are long, thin lines.
Some animals [{}] spots, like leopards. We [{}] see spots or stripes on clothes and toys. These patterns help us recognize things.
